logic_mismatch.detail: C test has multi-phase GC verification with 4 KV tables, oldest_addr checks after each phase, and fdb_reboot persistence checks. Rust test only does basic blob set/get + iterate without verifying GC behavior or oldest_addr.
C test has multi-sector GC2 scenario with big KV4 spanning sectors, triggering specific GC path. Rust test is identical to simplified gc test — does not test the gc2 scenario at all.
C test does 4→8 sector expansion: save data, deinit, reinit with 8 sectors, verify old data, save new data, verify both. Rust test only does basic blob operations without sector expansion.

C test fills 5+ sectors with dynamic TSL count, does extensive boundary checks across sector boundaries with test_tsdb_data_by_time. Rust test only appends 5 small TSLs and does basic count/iter checks.

C test uses 16KB sectors, 512KB DB, NOT_FORMAT flag, 3 large blobs (7/8/9KB), reboot persistence check. Rust test uses standard 4KB sectors, 5 small appends, clean, re-append — completely different scenario.

results.name: gc
results.reason: 测试用例与C原测试用例不一致 — 测试逻辑不一致: C has multi-phase GC verification with oldest_addr checks and reboot persistence; Rust only does basic blob set/get without GC behavior verification

results.name: gc2
results.reason: 测试用例与C原测试用例不一致 — 测试逻辑不一致: C has multi-sector GC2 scenario with big KV4; Rust test is identical to simplified gc and does not test gc2 scenario

results.name: scale_up
results.reason: 测试用例与C原测试用例不一致 — 测试逻辑不一致: C tests 4→8 sector expansion with data persistence; Rust only does basic blob operations without expansion

results.name: tsl_append_by_time
results.note: Not in C test suite; covered by append scenarios

results.name: tsl_iter_reverse
results.note: Not in C test suite; not independently tested

results.name: tsdb_control
results.note: Not in C test suite; fdb_tsdb_control covered in init setup

results.name: tsdb_deinit
results.reason: 测试用例与C原测试用例不一致 — 测试逻辑不一致: C github_issue_249 uses 16KB sectors/512KB DB/3 large blobs with reboot persistence check; Rust uses standard 4KB sectors/5 small appends/clean/re-append — completely different scenario

benchmark.note: Rust uses in-memory storage (sidecar architecture); C uses real file I/O. Direct ratio comparison is not architecturally equivalent.

summary.benchmark: 性能基线测试：Rust 使用内存存储架构，KV set/get/del 吞吐分别为 C 的 754381%/643261%/3434831%（架构不等价：Rust 内存存储 vs C 文件 I/O），TSL append 延迟为 C 的 0.03%
